core_mechanism: singular-limit reduction of a coupled system of governing equations by order-of-magnitude (dominant-balance) scaling of a small dimensionless parameter, yielding two distinct degenerate regimes depending on which terms dominate
brief_reason: The abstract derives distinct limiting forms of a constraint equation (Coulomb vs. Lorenz gauge) as the 'magnetic limit' and 'electric limit' using orders of magnitude based on physical motivations, i.e. a small-parameter dominant-balance limit that splits one system into two reduced regimes.
